case_title: SANTOS RICO PINTO VS. YONG CHO ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING - FILED AT THE INSISTENCE OF THE LITIGANT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHO, YONG DBA PARAMOUNT CONSTRUCTION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($40.00) SERVED AUG-09-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOLRENA
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO YONG CHO ON 10/15/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH STREET - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,500.00 FILED BY PINTO, SANTOS RICO AS TO DEFENDANT CHO, YONG DBA PARAMOUNT CONSTRUCTION KYAW, TIN ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS TIM SOE SOLRENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED AUG-09-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHO, YONG DBA PARAMOUNT CONSTRUCTION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PINTO, SANTOS RICO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHO, YONG DBA PARAMOUNT CONSTRUCTION $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 INTEREST, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,235.00, DEFENDANT YONG CHO SHALL PAY $3,000 PLUS STATUTORY PREJUDGMENT INTEREST & COSTS. DEFENDANT TIN KYAW IS NOT DIRECTLY LIABLE TO PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT SOLRENA IS DISMISSED AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF'S ENTITLEMENT TO PAYMENT FOR HIS SERVICES DOES NOT DEPEND ON THE COST OF THE TESTING LAB. YONG CHO IS DOING BUSINESS AS PARAMOUNT CONSTRUCTION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHO, YONG DBA PARAMOUNT CONSTRUCTION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-09-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-09-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF SANTOS RICO PINTO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YONG CHO IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS TIM SOE) TIN KYAW IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SOLRENA IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT'S TIN KYAW & SOLRENA ARE DEFECTIVE. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS TO DISMISS DEFENDANT SOLRENA WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT TIN KYAW (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS TIM SOE) WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE. PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-09-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED AUG-09-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KYAW, TIN ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS TIM SOE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
